description: SAF file access for Android (tauri-plugin-android-fs). Android-only: the plugin crate is target-gated in Cargo.toml, so this capability must not apply on desktop. NOTE: the plugin's `android-fs:default` set is `all-without-delete`, which deliberately EXCLUDES every write command — relying on it made live save silently fail (read-only fallback). So we grant the exact least-privilege set the provider uses, writes included.
